001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer;
018
019import static java.util.stream.Collectors.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ReflectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.concurrent.*;
027import java.util.function.*;
028import java.util.stream.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
033
034/**
035 * Represents a group of {@link Serializer Serializers} that can be looked up by media type.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
038 *
039 * Provides the following features:
040 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
041 *    <li>
042 *       Finds serializers based on HTTP <c>Accept</c> header values.
043 *    <li>
044 *       Sets common properties on all serializers in a single method call.
045 *    <li>
046 *       Clones existing groups and all serializers within the group in a single method call.
047 * </ul>
048 *
049 * <h5 class='topic'>Match ordering</h5>
050 *
051 * Serializers are matched against <c>Accept</c> strings in the order they exist in this group.
052 *
053 * <p>
054 * Adding new entries will cause the entries to be prepended to the group.
055 * This allows for previous serializers to be overridden through subsequent calls.
056 *
057 * <p>
058 * For example, calling <code>g.append(S1.<jk>class</jk>,S2.<jk>class</jk>).append(S3.<jk>class</jk>,S4.<jk>class</jk>)</code>
059 * will result in the order <c>S3, S4, S1, S2</c>.
060 *
061 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
062 * <p class='bjava'>
063 *    <jc>// Construct a new serializer group</jc>
064 *    SerializerSet <jv>serializers</jv> = SerializerSet.<jsm>create</jsm>();
065 *       .add(JsonSerializer.<jk>class</jk>, UrlEncodingSerializer.<jk>class</jk>) <jc>// Add some serializers to it</jc>
066 *       .forEach(<jv>x</jv> -&gt; <jv>x</jv>.calendarFormat(<jsf>ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME</jsf>))
067 *       .forEachWS(<jv>x</jv> -&gt; <jv>x</jv>.ws())
068 *       .build();
069 *
070 *    <jc>// Find the appropriate serializer by Accept type</jc>
071 *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = <jv>serializers</jv>
072 *       .getWriterSerializer(<js>"text/foo, text/json;q=0.8, text/*;q:0.6, *\/*;q=0.0"</js>)
073 *       .orElseThrow();  <jc>// Throws if no serializer matched the Accept header.</jc>
074 *
075 *    <jc>// Serialize a bean to JSON text </jc>
076 *    AddressBook <jv>addressBook</jv> = <jk>new</jk> AddressBook();  <jc>// Bean to serialize.</jc>
077 *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>addressBook</jv>);
078 * </p>
079 *
080 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
081 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
082 * </ul>
083 *
084 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
085 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SerializersAndParsers">Serializers and Parsers</a>
086
087 * </ul>
088 */
089public class SerializerSet {
090
091   /**
092    * Builder class.
093    */
094   @SuppressWarnings({
095      "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., CLASS_Inherit)
096   })
097   public static class Builder implements BeanStoreOverridable<Builder> {
098
099      private static final String CLASS_Inherit = "Inherit";
100
101      private BeanStore beanStore;
102      private SerializerSet impl;
103
104      List<Object> entries;
105      private MarshallingContext.Builder bcBuilder;
106
107      /**
108       * Create an empty serializer group builder.
109       *
110       * @param beanStore The bean store to use for creating beans.
111       */
112      protected Builder(BeanStore beanStore) {
113         this.beanStore = beanStore;
114         this.entries = list();
115      }
116
117      /**
118       * Clone an existing serializer group builder.
119       *
120       * <p>
121       * Serializer builders will be cloned during this process.
122       *
123       * @param copyFrom The serializer group that we're copying settings and serializers from.
124       */
125      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
126         this.beanStore = copyFrom.beanStore;
127         this.impl = copyFrom.impl;
128         bcBuilder = copyFrom.bcBuilder == null ? null : copyFrom.bcBuilder.copy();
129         entries = list();
130         copyFrom.entries.stream().map(this::copyBuilder).forEach(entries::add);
131      }
132
133      /**
134       * Clone an existing serializer group.
135       *
136       * @param copyFrom The serializer group that we're copying settings and serializers from.
137       */
138      protected Builder(SerializerSet copyFrom) {
139         this.beanStore = BasicBeanStore.INSTANCE;
140         this.entries = list((Object[])copyFrom.entries);
141      }
142
143      /**
144       * Returns the bean store used by this builder.
145       *
146       * @return The bean store used by this builder.
147       */
148      public BeanStore beanStore() {
149         return beanStore;
150      }
151
152      /**
153       * Installs the supplied {@link BeanStore} as the {@code overridingParent} of this builder's bean store.
154       *
155       * <p>
156       * Wraps the current {@link #beanStore()} in a fresh {@link BasicBeanStore} whose {@code overridingParent}
157       * is the supplied store, so test-time overrides win over the builder's regular bean lookups during
158       * construction-time reflective injection.  Passing {@code null} is a no-op.
159       *
160       * @param store The override layer.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
161       * @return This object.
162       * @since 10.0.0
163       */
164      @Override
165      @SuppressWarnings({
166         "resource" // BasicBeanStore lifecycle is owned by the enclosing builder; closed externally when the builder is disposed.
167      })
168      public Builder overridingBeanStore(BeanStore store) {
169         if (store != null)
170            this.beanStore = new BasicBeanStore(this.beanStore, store);
171         return this;
172      }
173
174      /**
175       * Adds the specified serializers to this group.
176       *
177       * <p>
178       * Entries are added in-order to the beginning of the list in the group.
179       *
180       * <p>
181       * The {@link NoInherit} class can be used to clear out the existing list of serializers before adding the new entries.
182       *
183       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
184       * <p class='bjava'>
185       *    SerializerSet.Builder <jv>builder</jv> = SerializerSet.<jsm>create</jsm>();  <jc>// Create an empty builder.</jc>
186       *
187       *    <jv>builder</jv>.add(FooSerializer.<jk>class</jk>);  <jc>// Now contains:  [FooSerializer]</jc>
188       *
189       *    <jv>builder</jv>.add(BarSerializer.<jk>class</jk>, BazSerializer.<jk>class</jk>);  <jc>// Now contains:  [BarParser,BazSerializer,FooSerializer]</jc>
190       *
191       *    <jv>builder</jv>.add(NoInherit.<jk>class</jk>, QuxSerializer.<jk>class</jk>);  <jc>// Now contains:  [QuxSerializer]</jc>
192       * </p>
193       *
194       * @param values The serializers to add to this group.
195       * @return This object.
196       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If one or more values do not extend from {@link Serializer}.
197       */
198      public Builder add(Class<?>...values) {
199         List<Object> l = list();
200         for (var e : values) {
201            if (Serializer.class.isAssignableFrom(e)) {
202               l.add(createBuilder(e));
203            } else {
204               throw rex("Invalid type passed to SerializeGroup.Builder.add(): {0}", cn(e));
205            }
206         }
207         entries.addAll(0, l);
208         return this;
209      }
210
211      /**
212       * Registers the specified serializers with this group.
213       *
214       * <p>
215       * When passing in pre-instantiated serializers to this group, applying properties and transforms to the group
216       * do not affect them.
217       *
218       * @param s The serializers to append to this group.
219       * @return This object.
220       */
221      public Builder add(Serializer...s) {
222         prependAll(entries, (Object[])s);
223         return this;
224      }
225
226      /**
227       * Applies the specified annotations to all applicable serializer builders in this group.
228       *
229       * @param work The annotations to apply.
230       * @return This object.
231       */
232      public Builder apply(AnnotationWorkList work) {
233         return forEach(x -> x.apply(work));
234      }
235
236      /**
237       * Associates an existing bean context builder with all serializer builders in this group.
238       *
239       * @param value The bean contest builder to associate.
240       * @return This object.
241       */
242      public Builder marshallingContext(MarshallingContext.Builder value) {
243         bcBuilder = value;
244         forEach(x -> x.marshallingContext(value));
245         return this;
246      }
247
248      /**
249       * Applies an operation to the bean context builder.
250       *
251       * @param operation The operation to apply.
252       * @return This object.
253       */
254      public final Builder marshallingContext(Consumer<MarshallingContext.Builder> operation) {
255         if (nn(bcBuilder))
256            operation.accept(bcBuilder);
257         return this;
258      }
259
260      /**
261       * Returns <jk>true</jk> if at least one of the specified annotations can be applied to at least one serializer builder in this group.
262       *
263       * @param work The work to check.
264       * @return <jk>true</jk> if at least one of the specified annotations can be applied to at least one serializer builder in this group.
265       */
266      public boolean canApply(AnnotationWorkList work) {
267      for (var o : entries)
268         if (o instanceof Serializer.Builder<?> o2 && o2.canApply(work))
269            return true;
270         return false;
271      }
272
273      /**
274       * Clears out any existing serializers in this group.
275       *
276       * @return This object.
277       */
278      public Builder clear() {
279         entries.clear();
280         return this;
281      }
282
283      /**
284       * Makes a copy of this builder.
285       *
286       * @return A new copy of this builder.
287       */
288      public Builder copy() {
289         return new Builder(this);
290      }
291
292      /**
293       * Performs an action on all serializer builders of the specified type in this group.
294       *
295       * @param <T> The serializer builder type.
296       * @param type The serializer builder type.
297       * @param action The action to perform.
298       * @return This object.
299       */
300      public <T extends Serializer.Builder<?>> Builder forEach(Class<T> type, Consumer<T> action) {
301         builders(type).forEach(action);
302         return this;
303      }
304
305      /**
306       * Performs an action on all serializer builders in this group.
307       *
308       * @param action The action to perform.
309       * @return This object.
310       */
311      @SuppressWarnings({
312         "rawtypes",  // Raw Consumer type required for generic builder dispatch across parameterized builder hierarchy.
313         "unchecked"  // Cast is safe: caller's Consumer<Serializer.Builder<?>> is compatible at runtime.
314      })
315      public Builder forEach(Consumer<Serializer.Builder<?>> action) {
316         builders(Serializer.Builder.class).forEach((Consumer)action);
317         return this;
318      }
319
320      /**
321       * Performs an action on all output stream serializer builders in this group.
322       *
323       * @param action The action to perform.
324       * @return This object.
325       */
326      @SuppressWarnings({
327         "rawtypes",  // Raw Consumer type required for generic builder dispatch across parameterized builder hierarchy.
328         "unchecked"  // Cast is safe: caller's Consumer<OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<?>> is compatible at runtime.
329      })
330      public Builder forEachOSS(Consumer<OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<?>> action) {
331         return forEach((Class)OutputStreamSerializer.Builder.class, (Consumer)action);
332      }
333
334      /**
335       * Performs an action on all writer serializer builders in this group.
336       *
337       * @param action The action to perform.
338       * @return This object.
339       */
340      @SuppressWarnings({
341         "rawtypes",  // Raw Consumer type required for generic builder dispatch across parameterized builder hierarchy.
342         "unchecked"  // Cast is safe: caller's Consumer<WriterSerializer.Builder<?>> is compatible at runtime.
343      })
344      public Builder forEachWS(Consumer<WriterSerializer.Builder<?>> action) {
345         return forEach((Class)WriterSerializer.Builder.class, (Consumer)action);
346      }
347
348      /**
349       * Overrides the bean returned by the {@link #build()} method with a pre-built instance.
350       *
351       * @param value The pre-built instance.
352       * @return This object.
353       */
354      public Builder impl(Object value) {
355         impl = (SerializerSet) value;
356         return this;
357      }
358
359      /**
360       * Returns direct access to the {@link Serializer} and {@link Serializer.Builder}objects in this builder.
361       *
362       * <p>
363       * Provided to allow for any extraneous modifications to the list not accomplishable via other methods on this builder such
364       * as re-ordering/adding/removing entries.
365       *
366       * <p>
367       * Note that it is up to the user to ensure that the list only contains {@link Serializer} and {@link Serializer.Builder}objects.
368       *
369       * @return The inner list of entries in this builder.
370       */
371      public List<Object> inner() {
372         return entries;
373      }
374
375      /**
376       * Sets the specified serializers for this group.
377       *
378       * <p>
379       * Existing values are overwritten.
380       *
381       * <p>
382       * The {@link Inherit} class can be used to insert existing entries in this group into the position specified.
383       *
384       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
385       * <p class='bjava'>
386       *    SerializerSet.Builder <jv>builder</jv> = SerializerSet.<jsm>create</jsm>();  <jc>// Create an empty builder.</jc>
387       *
388       *    <jv>builder</jv>.set(FooSerializer.<jk>class</jk>);  <jc>// Now contains:  [FooSerializer]</jc>
389       *
390       *    <jv>builder</jv>.set(BarSerializer.<jk>class</jk>, BazSerializer.<jk>class</jk>);  <jc>// Now contains:  [BarParser,BazSerializer]</jc>
391       *
392       *    <jv>builder</jv>.set(Inherit.<jk>class</jk>, QuxSerializer.<jk>class</jk>);  <jc>// Now contains:  [BarParser,BazSerializer,QuxSerializer]</jc>
393       * </p>
394       *
395       * @param values The serializers to set in this group.
396       * @return This object.
397       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If one or more values do not extend from {@link Serializer} or named <js>"Inherit"</js>.
398       */
399      public Builder set(Class<?>...values) {
400         List<Object> l = list();
401         for (var e : values) {
402            if (e.getSimpleName().equals(CLASS_Inherit)) {
403               l.addAll(entries);
404            } else if (Serializer.class.isAssignableFrom(e)) {
405               l.add(createBuilder(e));
406            } else {
407               throw rex("Invalid type passed to SerializeGroup.Builder.set(): {0}", cn(e));
408            }
409         }
410         entries = l;
411         return this;
412      }
413
414      @Override /* Overridden from Object */
415      public String toString() {
416         return entries.stream().map(this::toString).collect(joining(",", "[", "]"));
417      }
418
419
420      private <T extends Serializer.Builder<?>> Stream<T> builders(Class<T> type) {
421         return entries.stream().filter(type::isInstance).map(type::cast);
422      }
423
424      private Object copyBuilder(Object o) {
425         if (o instanceof Serializer.Builder<?> x) {
426            Serializer.Builder<?> x2 = x.copy();
427            if (neq(x.getClass(), x2.getClass()))
428               throw rex("Copy method not implemented on class {0}", cn(x));
429            x = x2;
430            if (nn(bcBuilder))
431               x.marshallingContext(bcBuilder);
432            return x;
433         }
434         return o;
435      }
436
437      private Object createBuilder(Object o) {
438         if (o instanceof Class<?> o2) {
439
440            // Check for no-arg constructor.
441            var ci = info(o2).getPublicConstructor(c -> c.getParameterCount() == 0).orElse(null);
442            if (nn(ci))
443               return ci.newInstance();
444
445            // Check for builder create method.
446            @SuppressWarnings({
447               "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
448            })
449            Serializer.Builder<?> b = Serializer.createSerializerBuilder((Class<? extends Serializer>)o);
450            if (nn(bcBuilder))
451               b.marshallingContext(bcBuilder);
452            o = b;
453         }
454         return o;
455      }
456
457      private String toString(Object o) {
458         if (o == null)
459            return "null";
460         if (o instanceof Serializer.Builder<?>)
461            return "builder:" + cn(o);
462         return "serializer:" + cn(o);
463      }
464
465      /**
466       * Builds the serializer set.
467       *
468       * @return A new {@link SerializerSet}.
469       */
470      public SerializerSet build() {
471         if (nn(impl))
472            return impl;
473         return new SerializerSet(this);
474      }
475   }
476
477   /**
478    * An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
479    * <p>
480    * Used by {@link SerializerSet.Builder#set(Class...)}
481    */
482   public abstract static class Inherit extends Serializer {
483      protected Inherit(Serializer.Builder<?> builder) {
484         super(builder);
485      }
486   }
487
488   /**
489    * An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
490    * <p>
491    * Used by {@link SerializerSet.Builder#add(Class...)}
492    */
493   public abstract static class NoInherit extends Serializer {
494      protected NoInherit(Serializer.Builder<?> builder) {
495         super(builder);
496      }
497   }
498
499   /**
500    * Static creator.
501    *
502    * @return A new builder for this object.
503    */
504   public static Builder create() {
505      return new Builder(BasicBeanStore.INSTANCE);
506   }
507
508   /**
509    * Static creator.
510    *
511    * @param beanStore The bean store to use for creating beans.
512    * @return A new builder for this object.
513    */
514   public static Builder create(BeanStore beanStore) {
515      return new Builder(beanStore);
516   }
517
518   // Maps Accept headers to matching serializers.
519   private final ConcurrentHashMap<String,SerializerMatch> cache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
520
521   private final MediaRange[] mediaRanges;
522   private final List<MediaRange> mediaRangesList;
523   private final Serializer[] mediaTypeRangeSerializers;
524
525   private final MediaType[] mediaTypes;
526   private final List<MediaType> mediaTypesList;
527   final Serializer[] entries;
528   private final List<Serializer> entriesList;
529
530   /**
531    * Constructor.
532    *
533    * @param builder The builder for this bean.
534    */
535   protected SerializerSet(Builder builder) {
536
537      this.entries = builder.entries.stream().map(this::build).toArray(Serializer[]::new);
538      this.entriesList = u(l(entries));
539
540      List<MediaRange> lmtr = list();
541      Set<MediaType> lmt = set();
542      List<Serializer> l = list();
543      for (var e : entries) {
544         e.getMediaTypeRanges().forEachRange(x -> {
545            lmtr.add(x);
546            l.add(e);
547         });
548         e.forEachAcceptMediaType(lmt::add);
549      }
550
551      this.mediaRanges = lmtr.toArray(new MediaRange[lmtr.size()]);
552      this.mediaRangesList = u(l(mediaRanges));
553      this.mediaTypes = lmt.toArray(new MediaType[lmt.size()]);
554      this.mediaTypesList = u(l(mediaTypes));
555      this.mediaTypeRangeSerializers = l.toArray(new Serializer[l.size()]);
556   }
557
558   /**
559    * Creates a copy of this serializer group.
560    *
561    * @return A new copy of this serializer group.
562    */
563   public Builder copy() {
564      return new Builder(this);
565   }
566
567   /**
568    * Same as {@link #getSerializerMatch(MediaType)} but returns just the matched serializer.
569    *
570    * @param mediaType The HTTP media type.
571    * @return The serializer that matched the accept header, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
572    */
573   public Optional<Serializer> getSerializer(MediaType mediaType) {
574      return getSerializerMatch(mediaType).map(SerializerMatch::getSerializer);
575   }
576
577   /**
578    * Same as {@link #getSerializerMatch(String)} but returns just the matched serializer.
579    *
580    * @param acceptHeader The HTTP <l>Accept</l> header string.
581    * @return The serializer that matched the accept header, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
582    */
583   public Optional<Serializer> getSerializer(String acceptHeader) {
584      return getSerializerMatch(acceptHeader).map(SerializerMatch::getSerializer);
585   }
586
587   /**
588    * Same as {@link #getSerializerMatch(String)} but matches using a {@link MediaType} instance.
589    *
590    * @param mediaType The HTTP media type.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
591    * @return The serializer and media type that matched the media type, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
592    */
593   public Optional<SerializerMatch> getSerializerMatch(MediaType mediaType) {
594      return mediaType == null ? opte() : getSerializerMatch(mediaType.toString());
595   }
596
597   /**
598    * Searches the group for a serializer that can handle the specified <c>Accept</c> value.
599    *
600    * <p>
601    * The <c>accept</c> value complies with the syntax described in RFC2616, Section 14.1, as described below:
602    * <p class='bcode'>
603    *    Accept         = "Accept" ":"
604    *                      #( media-range [ accept-params ] )
605    *
606    *    media-range    = ( "*\/*"
607    *                      | ( type "/" "*" )
608    *                      | ( type "/" subtype )
609    *                      ) *( ";" parameter )
610    *    accept-params  = ";" "q" "=" qvalue *( accept-extension )
611    *    accept-extension = ";" token [ "=" ( token | quoted-string ) ]
612    * </p>
613    *
614    * <p>
615    * The returned object includes both the serializer and media type that matched.
616    *
617    * @param acceptHeader The HTTP <l>Accept</l> header string.
618    * @return The serializer and media type that matched the accept header, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
619    */
620   public Optional<SerializerMatch> getSerializerMatch(String acceptHeader) {
621      if (acceptHeader == null)
622         return opte();
623      SerializerMatch sm = cache.get(acceptHeader);
624      if (nn(sm))
625         return opt(sm);
626
627      var a = MediaRanges.of(acceptHeader);
628      int match = a.match(mediaRangesList);
629      if (match >= 0) {
630         sm = new SerializerMatch(mediaRanges[match], mediaTypeRangeSerializers[match]);
631         cache.putIfAbsent(acceptHeader, sm);
632      }
633
634      return opt(cache.get(acceptHeader));
635   }
636
637   /**
638    * Returns a copy of the serializers in this group.
639    *
640    * @return An unmodifiable list of serializers in this group.
641    */
642   public List<Serializer> getSerializers() { return entriesList; }
643
644   /**
645    * Same as {@link #getSerializer(MediaType)}, but casts it to a {@link OutputStreamSerializer}.
646    *
647    * @param mediaType The HTTP media type.
648    * @return The serializer that matched the accept header, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
649    */
650   public Optional<OutputStreamSerializer> getStreamSerializer(MediaType mediaType) {
651      return getSerializer(mediaType).map(OutputStreamSerializer.class::cast);
652   }
653
654   /**
655    * Same as {@link #getSerializer(String)}, but casts it to an {@link OutputStreamSerializer}.
656    *
657    * @param acceptHeader The HTTP <l>Accept</l> header string.
658    * @return The serializer that matched the accept header, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
659    */
660   public Optional<OutputStreamSerializer> getStreamSerializer(String acceptHeader) {
661      return getSerializer(acceptHeader).map(OutputStreamSerializer.class::cast);
662   }
663
664   /**
665    * Returns the media types that all serializers in this group can handle.
666    *
667    * <p>
668    * Entries are ordered in the same order as the serializers in the group.
669    *
670    * @return An unmodifiable list of media types.
671    */
672   public List<MediaType> getSupportedMediaTypes() { return mediaTypesList; }
673
674   /**
675    * Same as {@link #getSerializer(MediaType)}, but casts it to a {@link WriterSerializer}.
676    *
677    * @param mediaType The HTTP media type.
678    * @return The serializer that matched the accept header, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
679    */
680   public Optional<WriterSerializer> getWriterSerializer(MediaType mediaType) {
681      return getSerializer(mediaType).map(WriterSerializer.class::cast);
682   }
683
684   /**
685    * Same as {@link #getSerializer(String)}, but casts it to a {@link WriterSerializer}.
686    *
687    * @param acceptHeader The HTTP <l>Accept</l> header string.
688    * @return The serializer that matched the accept header, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no match was made.
689    */
690   public Optional<WriterSerializer> getWriterSerializer(String acceptHeader) {
691      return getSerializer(acceptHeader).map(WriterSerializer.class::cast);
692   }
693
694   /**
695    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this group contains no serializers.
696    *
697    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this group contains no serializers.
698    */
699   public boolean isEmpty() { return entries.length == 0; }
700
701   private Serializer build(Object o) {
702      if (o instanceof Serializer o2)
703         return o2;
704      return ((Serializer.Builder<?>)o).build();
705   }
706}
